question: Can a fixed MVRV-below-one value zone OR completed-month 10-month slow trend, at a 1.25x cap, beat raw 1x BTC buy-and-hold in every complete historical bull leg after conservative costs and financing while reducing bear losses?
decision_use: Test a low-complexity value-plus-momentum structure that avoids daily double-top whipsaw and decaying high MVRV-Z thresholds; Demo remains excluded.
strongest_claim_if_all_gates_pass: Supports a stable historical possibility across three rule-level cycles and an actual-funding bridge; it does not guarantee future returns or prove that the present market is at a bottom.
known_exposure: All BTC price and MVRV history through 2026H1 has been viewed, and several related rules have failed. The 10-month trend is selected from external published work rather than a BTC horizon sweep, but this exact OR rule and 1.25x mapping have not been run. Confirmation is not untouched market data.

fixed_rule.slow_trend: last completed month-end PriceUSD is above the rolling mean of the last 10 completed month-end observations, including that month

fixed_diagnostics_not_eligible_for_selec: the same OR rule capped at 1.0x
completed-month 10-month slow trend alone capped at 1.25x
MVRV below 1.0 value zone alone capped at 1.25x
development_gate: both complete development bull legs beat buy-and-hold in Base and Stress
full development Base and Stress beat buy-and-hold
development Base maximum drawdown is shallower than buy-and-hold
the complete 2017-peak to 2018-bottom bear leg beats buy-and-hold
both MVRV value-zone actions are within plus or minus 90 days and actual peak weights are at least 1.0x
both first post-peak reductions to at most 0.25x occur within 180 days
the candidate is not strictly dominated by any fixed diagnostic on total return, Sharpe and maximum drawdown
180-day block-bootstrap probability of beating buy-and-hold is at least 0.80
confirmation_gate: the 2022-2025 bull leg beats buy-and-hold in Base and Stress
the full confirmation period beats buy-and-hold in Base
confirmation maximum drawdown is shallower than buy-and-hold
the observed post-2025-peak bear segment beats buy-and-hold
the Binance actual-funding bridge beats the spot buy-and-hold proxy in Base and Stress for the 2022-2025 bull leg
stop_rule: Any development failure keeps confirmation and Binance bridge unopened. Diagnostics cannot replace the candidate, and MVRV, monthly horizon, OR mapping or 1.25x cap cannot be retuned from this study.
allowed_fixes: Only data-integrity, parsing, timestamp, deterministic calculation, serialization or documentation fixes that do not change the rule, periods, windows, costs, gates, trial counts or bootstrap settings; record before rerun.
